---
title: "My awesome website"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cerulean
---

# This is Xiaoni's awesome website

![](https://media.giphy.com/media/drXGoW1iudhKw/giphy.gif)

Website for course **P8105** at Columbia University in the City of New York

[Google](https://www.google.com/) is used to do data science.


If you'd like to learn more about this website, visit [this page](about.html)
